name: Baked Potato Soup 2
recipeIngredient: 4 large Baking potatoes, baked, cooked, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Gradually whisk in flour and stir until smooth.
3. Slowly add milk while continuously stirring to avoid lumps.
4. Stir until the mixture thickens and coats the back of your spoon.
5. Add cubed potatoes and sliced green onions, then bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and let simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in crumbled bacon, shredded cheddar cheese, sour cream, salt, and pepper.
8. Continue stirring until the cheese is melted and well combined.
9. Serve hot and enjoy immediately.
